citations.narrative:
The Golden eagle and the Bald eagle are housed outdoors and do not have access to a shelter. The facility
representative stated that the birds have not had a shelter for approximately one month. The recent weather conditions in
the area have been stormy and wet. Failure to provide a shelter does not ensure the birds can escape inclement weather
conditions which could have a negative impact on their health and well-being.
Outdoor housing facilities must provide adequate shelter, appropriate to the species and physical condition of the birds,
for the local climatic conditions to protect the birds from any adverse weather conditions. The licensee must provide each
bird with a compliant shelter to ensure they are protected during times of inclement weather.
Correction date: At the time of the inspection, the facility representatives were able to provide a compliant shelter to both
eagle enclosures.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
Additional Inspectors:
Emily Steele, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n

narrative:
3.152(b) 
   
Facilities, outdoor 
The Golden eagle and the Bald eagle are housed outdoors and do not have access to a shelter. The facility 
representative stated that the birds have not had a shelter for approximately one month. The recent weather conditions in 
the area have been stormy and wet. Failure to provide a shelter does not ensure the birds can escape inclement weather 
conditions which could have a negative impact on their health and well-being.  
 
Outdoor housing facilities must provide adequate shelter, appropriate to the species and physical condition of the birds, 
for the local climatic conditions to protect the birds from any adverse weather conditions. The licensee must provide each 
bird with a compliant shelter to ensure they are protected during times of inclement weather.  
 
Correction date: At the time of the inspection, the facility representatives were able to provide a compliant shelter to both 
eagle enclosures. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative. 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
Emily Steele, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n

species.common: CONGO AFRICAN GREY PARROT / GRAY PARROT
